response:
Subject: Request to Unblock Account – Suspicious Payment Concerns  

Dear Google Support,  

I am writing to formally request the unblocking of my account, which was recently suspended due to suspicious payment activities. I did not make any payments that triggered the block, and I am confident in my account's legitimacy.  

I understand that security measures are in place to protect users, and I appreciate your efforts to ensure account safety. I would like to clarify that the payments in question were not mine, and I am willing to provide additional information to resolve this matter.  

Please consider unblocking my account and allowing me to continue using Google services. I am committed to complying with all policies and would be happy to cooperate further.  

Thank you for your attention to this matter.  

Sincerely,  
[Your Name]
